CustomField.formula:
IF( text(leaseworks__Project_Status__c) = "Closed",
IMAGE(CASE(leaseworks__Project_State__c,
"On Track", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "Closed",
"At Risk", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "Closed",
"Delayed", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "Closed",
"/s.gif"), "status color"),
IF( text(leaseworks__Project_Status__c) = "In Progress",
IMAGE(CASE(leaseworks__Project_State__c,
"On Track", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "OnTrack",
"At Risk", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "AtRisk",
"Delayed", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "Delayed",
"/s.gif"), "status color"),
IF( text(leaseworks__Project_Status__c) = "Open",
IMAGE(CASE(leaseworks__Project_State__c,
"On Track", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "OnTrack",
"At Risk", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "AtRisk",
"Delayed", "/resource/"+ $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "Delayed",
"/s.gif"), "status color"),
Null)))
CustomField.label: Project State (Img)
